versions.version_description: This song is in the Key of E

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab]                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I've got another confession to make[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I'm your fool[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Everyone's got their chains to break[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Holdin' you[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Were you born to resist or be abused?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bsus4[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]        [ch]Asus[/ch]2 (hit and then let ring)
Are you gone and onto someone new?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I needed somewhere to hang my head[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Without your noose[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
You gave me something that I didn't have[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But had no use[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I was too weak to give in[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Too strong to lose[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]
My heart is under arrest again[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But I break loose[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]
My head is giving me life or death[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
But I can't choose[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I swear I'll never give in[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I refuse[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]                      [ch]C#5[/ch]           [ch]B5[/ch]                    [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C#5[/ch]                [ch]B5[/ch]                  [ch]A5[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                         [ch]C#5[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Its real, the pain you feel[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A5[/ch]
You trust, you must[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#5[/ch]
Confess[/tab]
                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                    
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Oh...[/tab]


[Interlude]

[tab][ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]A5[/ch]   [ch]B5[/ch]   [ch]A5[/ch]
Oh...Oh...Oh...Oh...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]C#5[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Its real, the pain you feel[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
The life, the love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]
You die to heal[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
The hope that starts[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
The broken hearts[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You trust, you must[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]
Confess[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bsus4[/ch]                 sus2  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I've got another confession my friend[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A5[/ch]
I'm no fool[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm getting tired of starting again[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A5[/ch]
Somewhere new[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bsus4[/ch]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Were you born to resist or be abused?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I swear I'll never give in[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I refuse[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bsus4[/ch]             
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]
                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bsus4[/ch]              
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]C#5[/ch]
Has someone taken your faith?[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Its real, the pain you feel[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You trust, you must[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
Confess[/tab]
                       [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bsus4[/ch]               
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Is someone getting the best, the best, the best, the best of you?[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Oh...[/tab]


this is a awsome song by one of my favorite bands....if you dont like this tab, you can 
just play most any chord as a 5 chord and it will sound pretty close but mayb missing 
of the depth
